body_html:
Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "Steven Storch" <sstorch@samlegal.com>
Date: April 24, 2008 1:41:19 PM EDT
To: "Darren K. Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>
Subject: Condren
Reply-To: sstorch@samlegal.com

We spoke. I can fill you in on the details tomorrow or Monday( if that works better for you).
Bottom line, after some posturing from him about how  he doesn't know what the "gripe" is, he wants to meet to see if something can "be worked out". Friday May 2 9am my office.
I am back in the office tomorrow and free to talk anytime. Am in transit for much of rest of day.
Steven Storch
Storch Amini & Munves, P.C.

25th Floor
